info.title: Sales CoPilot API
info.description:
REST API for Sales CoPilot — an AI-powered presentation platform with narrated slides, live Q&A, and deck management.

**Authentication**: Most endpoints require a session cookie obtained from `POST /api/auth/login`. Presentation playback endpoints (`/api/qa`, `/api/narration/*`) also accept a `presentationId` for unauthenticated viewer access.

tags.name: Q&A
tags.description: Live question answering and Q&A settings

tags.name: Presentations
tags.description: Create and manage personalized presentation instances

tags.name: Generation
tags.description: AI-powered content generation from slide images

tags.name: Templates
tags.description: Browse the global template library and instantiate templates into your organization

tags.name: Activity
tags.description: Recent presentation events for the authenticated organization

deckContext.description: Background info used to guide AI narration generation

previewImageUrl.description: Presigned URL for the first slide image

audio_url.description: S3 key for the slide audio file

hero_img.description: S3 key for the slide image

avatar.description: S3 key for rep avatar image

audioUrl.description: S3 key for the pre-generated answer audio

resumePromptText.description: Spoken prompt asking if the viewer wants to continue the presentation

transitionPromptText.description: Spoken bridge from Q&A back into the presentation

audioUrl.description: Accessible URL for the synthesized audio
Accessible URL for the TTS audio of the answer

TemplateSummary.description: A deck published to the global template library.

tier.description: Entitlement tier. Premium templates require an active subscription to instantiate.

previewImageUrl.description: Accessible URL for the first slide image in the template

TemplatePreview.description: Rich preview data for a global template, including slide thumbnails and example questions.

heroImgUrl.description: Accessible URL for the slide thumbnail

faqSamples.description: Up to five example questions surfaced in the preview dialog.

AdminTemplate.description: A template owned by the current author org, returned from the moderation list.

PresentationListItem.description: A single presentation in the org-wide list, joined with deck name.

deckName.description: Resolved deck name, or null if the deck was deleted

snapshotMetadata.description: Snapshot of deck metadata at presentation creation time

ActivityEvent.description: A presentation event enriched with homeowner and deck context for display.

presentationName.description: Homeowner full name, or `Unknown` if not set

address.description: Concatenated homeowner address, city, and state

deckName.description: Resolved deck name, falling back to the snapshot if the deck was deleted

get.description: Returns all decks for the authenticated organization, ordered by most recently created.

deckContext.description: Background information to guide AI narration generation (e.g. audience, purpose)

get.description: Returns the full deck including slides, FAQs, branding, and Q&A settings.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a deck and all associated slides, FAQs, and branding.

slideIds.description: Full ordered array of slide UUIDs. Position in array becomes the new orderIndex.

post.description: Creates a FAQ and automatically generates TTS audio for the answer.

warning.description: Present if audio generation failed (FAQ is still saved)

200.description: Branding configuration, or null if not yet set

put.description: Creates or replaces the branding configuration for a deck.

avatar.description: S3 key for rep avatar image

get.description: Returns the customizable resume and transition prompts for the deck's Q&A experience.

post.description: Accepts uploaded slide images, runs them through GPT-4o Vision to extract content, generates narration scripts, and synthesizes audio. Returns a job ID — poll `/api/decks/{deckId}/generate/status` for progress.

images.description: Slide images (PNG, JPG, or WebP; max 10 MB each)

get.description: Returns all non-deleted presentations created from this deck.

post.description: Creates a personalized presentation for a homeowner. The address is validated via Google Geocoding. Returns a shareable URL immediately; audio generation may continue in the background.

price_inputs.description: Values for deck-level price variables (used to evaluate formulas)

patch.description: Partial update for homeowner data, voice settings, language, or price inputs.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a presentation (sets `deletedAt`). The shareable URL stops working immediately.

get.description: Returns the current processing status and slide readiness.

post.description:
Answers a viewer question. Checks FAQs first (exact then semantic match at ≥ 0.6 confidence), falls back to GPT-4o with slide context. Returns answer text plus synthesized audio.

**Authentication**: Accepts either a session cookie (admin) or a `presentationId` (public viewer).
Generates TTS audio for a slide script. Results are cached per session.
Batch TTS generation. Per-slide failures return a fallback audio URL rather than failing the whole batch.
Generates the spoken bridge from Q&A back into the presentation, using the deck's configured transition prompt.

get.description: Returns all uploaded images for the authenticated organization.

post.description: Uploads and optimizes an image (Sharp: max 1920px width, JPEG quality 85). Returns the S3 key and a presigned URL.

file.description: Image file (PNG, JPG, or WebP; max 10 MB)

get.description: Returns a curated list of ElevenLabs voices suitable for sales presentations.

get.summary: List all presentations for the organization
get.description: Returns every non-deleted presentation across all decks in the authenticated organization, joined with the deck name. Ordered by most recently updated. Used by the My Presentations dashboard.

Returns every active template published to the global library, sorted by tier (free first) then most recent. The owning author org is intentionally not included so customers cannot see who published each template.

Returns slide thumbnails, slide and FAQ counts, and up to five example questions so customers can evaluate a template before instantiating it. Returns 404 for any deck that is not visibility=`global` and active, even when the caller is signed in (defense-in-depth so private decks never leak).

404.description: Template not found, not global, or inactive

post.description: Deep-copies the global template into the caller's organization. Both database rows and S3 assets are duplicated, so the new deck is fully independent of the source and can be edited freely. Returns 403 with `code: PREMIUM_LOCKED` when the source template is `tier=premium` until a subscription entitlement is attached.

name.description: Optional override for the new deck's name. Defaults to the source name; collisions are renamed automatically.

201.description: Template instantiated as a new deck in the caller's organization

403.description: Premium template requires an active subscription

404.description: Template not found, not global, or inactive

get.summary: List templates owned by your organization
get.description: Moderation list for library author orgs. Returns the global templates owned by the authenticated org so you can see exactly which rows you can edit, republish, or unpublish. Requires the `is_library_author` flag on the organization.

200.description: Templates owned by the current author org

403.description: Organization is not a library author

put.summary: Publish or republish a deck to the library
put.description: Publishes the deck to the global template library, or bumps `publishedAt` if it is already published. The same endpoint serves both initial publish and the explicit Republish action used after edits. Requires the caller's organization to own the deck and have `is_library_author` set.

parameters.name: deckId
parameters.description: UUID of the deck to publish

tier.description: Entitlement tier for the published template

403.description: Organization is not a library author

404.description: Deck not found or not owned by the current organization

delete.summary: Unpublish a deck from the library
delete.description: Reverts the deck to `visibility=private` and clears its tier and publish timestamps. Customer-instantiated copies are unaffected — they live as separate rows in their own organizations.

parameters.name: deckId
parameters.description: UUID of the deck to unpublish

403.description: Organization is not a library author

404.description: Deck not found or not owned by the current organization

get.description: Returns the ten most recent presentation events for the authenticated organization, enriched with homeowner name, address, and deck name for deep-linking. The deck name falls back to the snapshot stored on the presentation if the deck has since been deleted.
Returns `{ ok: true }` if the service is running.
